name: panoramax-cli
documentation:
# ![Panoramax](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a9/Panoramax.svg/40px-Panoramax.svg.png) Panoramax

__Panoramax__ is a digital resource for sharing and using 📍📷 field photos. Anyone can take photographs of places visible from the public streets and contribute them to the Panoramax database. This data is then freely accessible and reusable by all. More information available at [gitlab.com/panoramax](https://gitlab.com/panoramax) and [panoramax.fr](https://panoramax.fr/).


# ⌨️ Panoramax Command-line scripts

This repository contains only the __command-line interface (CLI)__ of Panoramax.

## Features

This tool allows you to:

- Upload pictures to a Panoramax server
- Download pictures from a Panoramax server
- Transfer pictures between Panoramax servers

## Documentation

All our documentation is available under [docs folder](https://gitlab.com/panoramax/clients/cli/-/tree/main/docs).

## ⚖️ License

Copyright (c) Panoramax team 2022-2024, [released under MIT license](https://gitlab.com/panoramax/clients/cli/-/blob/main/LICENSE).

functions.name: panoramax_cli.utils.removeNoneInDict
documentation: Removes empty values from dictionnary

variables.name: panoramax_cli.utils.REQUESTS_CNX_TIMEOUT
documentation: max number of seconds to wait for the connection to establish, cf https://www.python-httpx.org/advanced/timeouts/

functions.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.find_handler
documentation:
Find a MetadataHandler in the directory.

Each registered MetadataHandler is responsible to know if they can be inited by a given file

methods.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.MetadataHandler.new_from_file
documentation:
Method to create the handler from a file.
If the handler cannot be created from this file, returns None

methods.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.MetadataHandler.get
documentation:
Method overloaded by the MetadataHandler

It takes the path of a picture file and return a PartialGeoPicTags if possible

functions.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.utils.parse_hms
documentation:
Compute decimal coordinates (latitude or longitude) from degrees/minutes/seconds coordinates.

Args:

: value: raw lat (or lon)
  ref: 1 if the value is North or East

Returns:

: float: real lat (or lon) or None if a problem occurs

```pycon
>>> parse_hms("50° 30' 54.36\"", 1)
50.5151
>>> parse_hms("plop", 1) # doctest: +IGNORE_EXCEPTION_DETAIL
Traceback (most recent call last):
panoramax_cli.exception.CliException: impossible to parse position: plop
```

functions.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.utils.check_lat
documentation: parse and check latitude

functions.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.utils.check_lon
documentation: parse and check longitude

functions.name: panoramax_cli.metadata.utils.parse_capture_time

functions.name: panoramax_cli.http.createClientWithRetry
documentation: Creates a httpx client with automatic retry on failure

documentation: Define the conditions for retrying based on HTTP status codes

functions.name: panoramax_cli.http.raise_retry_error
documentation: On failure, raise the exception if there is one, or return the httpx response

classes.name: panoramax_cli.http.retry_if_code_in_retry_status_forcelist
documentation: Handle retries for exception raised by raise_for_status and for invalid status_code

classes.name: panoramax_cli.http.Client

methods.name: panoramax_cli.http.Client._retry
documentation: Retry given function if the http call fails

Simple Wrapper around an httpx Client, retrying GET and POST method

Note that only the used functions of the httpx Client are implemented, if more method are needed, they'll need to be wraped too

Note: The streaming part is not handled, as it is tricky to retry a generator.

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--version",
            callback=version_callback,
            is_eager=True,
            help="Show Panoramax command-line client version and exit",
        )

functions.name: panoramax_cli.main.upload

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--merge-subfolders/--separate-subfolders",
            help="Should subfolders be considered as independent sequences, or sent as a single upload set ?",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--disable-duplicates-check/--enable-duplicates-check",
            help="""Disable locally checking for pictures duplicates (almost same time and coordinates).
Disabling this avoids long local processing (duplicates are checked on server-side), enabling avoids sending useless pictures to server.
Choose depending on if your Internet is faster than your hard drive.""",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--disable-cert-check/--enable-cert-check",
            help="Disable SSL certificates checks while uploading. This should not be used unless you __really__ know what you are doing.",
        )

documentation:
Uploads some files.

Upload some files to a Panoramax instance. The files will be associated to one or many sequences.

functions.name: panoramax_cli.main.check_sequences

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--merge-subfolders/--separate-subfolders",
            help="Should subfolders be considered as independent sequences, or sent as a single upload set ?",
        )

documentation:
Checks pictures and sequences.
This simulates processing done by the server to reflect sequences splits,
find pictures duplicates and missing metadata.
This runs in local, nothing is sent to the server.

functions.name: panoramax_cli.main.download

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--disable-cert-check/--enable-cert-check",
            help="Disable SSL certificates checks while downloading. This should not be used unless you __really__ know what you are doing.",
        )

documentation: Downloads one or many sequences.

functions.name: panoramax_cli.main.transfer

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--disable-cert-check/--enable-cert-check",
            help="Disable SSL certificates checks while downloading. This should not be used unless you __really__ know what you are doing.",
        )

documentation:
Transfer one or many sequences.
This command copy sequences from origin API to destination API.
Note that it doesn't delete sequences on origin API.

functions.name: panoramax_cli.main.upload_status

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--disable-cert-check/--enable-cert-check",
            help="Disable SSL certificates checks while uploading. This should not be used unless you __really__ know what you are doing.",
        )

documentation: Status of one or many Upload Sets.

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--disable-cert-check/--enable-cert-check",
            help="Disable SSL certificates checks while uploading. This should not be used unless you __really__ know what you are doing.",
        )

functions.name: panoramax_cli.upload.path_to_upload_sets
documentation:
Analyzes a given folder to find how many upload sets should be created

Parameters
----------
    path (Path) : pointer to path to read
    params (UploadParameters) : parameters retrieved from users to inject in UploadSets
    mergeSubfolders (bool) : make all subfolder part of same upload set

Returns
-------
    UploadSet[]

documentation: Convert the overriden metadata into panoramax API parameters

documentation: Close Upload Set on API

documentation: Checks validity of UploadSet without upload
